token_usage_guidance.interactive: Use primary colors for CTAs, neutral for secondary. Apply spacing-2/3 for padding, radius-md.
token_usage_guidance.form: Use neutral borders, radius-base, consistent spacing-2 for padding. Error states use error-500.
token_usage_guidance.container: Use neutral backgrounds, shadow-base/md for elevation, radius-lg, spacing-4 padding.
token_usage_guidance.layout: Use breakpoint tokens for responsive behavior, z-index for stacking, spacing-4+ for margins.
token_usage_guidance.overlay: Use high z-index values, shadow-lg, radius-xl. Backdrop with neutral-900/50 opacity.
token_usage_guidance.data-display: Use neutral colors for grids/tables, spacing-2 cell padding, radius-base for cells.
token_usage_guidance.decorative: Use restrained color from primary palette. Keep size consistent with typography scale.
token_usage_guidance.page: Use section-level spacing (space-8+), neutral backgrounds, full breakpoint responsiveness.
token_usage_guidance.custom: Apply tokens based on the component's actual role. Default to neutral palette.
